data.body: d4cf IMPLEMENTED + COMMITTED (69de814a4) under held-out TDD. New AGENT-tier advisory (0.95) G7 leaf-parent-containment criterion: require_parent_id applies_at axis (validated in overlay._validate_routing_entry, enforced in registry.applies via new has_parent param threaded from orchestrator.route_criteria/ctx.state[parent_id]); registered in CANONICAL_LLM+AGENT_TIER but NOT CODEBASE_GROUNDED; reviewers/plan_review_G7.md rubric (subset containment, parent-wins, show_ticket runtime read); coach move 13 (applies_when G7); plan-review.yaml G7 finder slot; regenerated criteria guide; committed g7-promotion-path.md (jq fire-rate over plan_review_result_v1 + 0.6-0.7 band, decision deferred to 72b6). 136 affected tests pass; 10 held-out edge tests pass; 2 mutations confirmed teeth (used cp backups for revert this time, NOT git checkout). Subagent also correctly caught the docs/plan-review-gate.md move-table parity requirement. FULL STACK NOW COMPLETE: 10 commits on top of origin/main (1950be9d4 ac0e -> 69de814a4 d4cf). NEXT: full CI pre-flight (make lint+typecheck+test), then push stack to gerrit refs/for/main, iterate, close leaves bottom-up after Verified+1, epic AC2 comment, close epic.
